questionHtml: Outline the biomagnification of DDE in brown pelicans.
markschemeHtml:
1. DDE accumulates in (fat tissues of) organisms/bioaccumulation;
  2. (brown) pelicans/birds feed on fish/organisms (that have accumulated DDE);
  3. (DDE) is not excreted;
  4. (DDE) concentration increases as trophic level increases;
  5. (brown) pelicans are in a high trophic level (so have a high accumulation);

meta.title: Outline the biomagnification of DDE in brown pelicans.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.2.9. Biomagnification of pollutants in natural ecosystems
